infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to take photos for your travel diary entries.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to automatically record the address of your travel photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you add travel entries.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to take travel photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Travel Diary to use your location.
